challenges.title: Custom Radio Buttons
challenges.description: Create custom-styled radio buttons with a circle fill animation when selected, without using JavaScript.
hints: Use appearance: none on radio inputs
Use ::before or ::after for the inner circle

challenges.title: Floating Label Form
challenges.description: Build a form where labels float above the input when the input is focused or has a value.
hints: Position the label absolutely over the input
Use CSS transitions for smooth animation

challenges.title: Multi-Step Form with Progress
challenges.description: Create a CSS-only multi-step form with a progress indicator showing the current step.
hints: Use radio buttons to track steps
Use ::before for step numbers in the progress bar
